action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy is 21.32% with CLIP ViT-B/16 + SWAD. Multiple attempts to train AugReg failed due to DDP issues and truncated scripts. I have ~3.15 hours and 8 iterations remaining. Analysis: Ensembling a diverse backbone (AugReg supervised IN-1k) with CLIP (vision-language) should improve OOD generalization. Previous failures were likely due to incomplete/truncated scripts. Decision: Write a complete, self-contained train_augreg.py with DDP, keeping it concise to avoid truncation. Also update predict.py with multi-scale TTA for additional gains. Train 15 epochs then submit eval.
